query: SELECT code, nameEn, nameAr, category, unit, standardRef, unitPrice, formTemplate FROM test_types WHERE isActive = 1 ORDER BY category, sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 377JW8jvRBid6gE.e90905f81c0c --database LsEH5DDGJizNggnY9JVscW --execute SELECT code, nameEn, nameAr, category, unit, standardRef, unitPrice, formTemplate FROM test_types WHERE isActive = 1 ORDER BY category, sortOrder;
